title: Minecraft HD(64x) Animated Textures Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, that gives animated textures for certain items and blocks.
body:
This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, that gives animated textures for certain items and blocks, such as buckets and eyes of ender.

This pack does not need a mod like Optifine or Continuity to work - it will work fine with the vanilla (unmodded) client.
